comment: Spec C (docs/specs/bench-all-ci-gates.md): the promises CI holds bench:all --gate to. Changing a number here is changing a public promise — it belongs in a reviewed diff, never in drift. Factors are vs the regex-extract baseline on the same runner (portable across machine speeds); observed self-map values at set-time are noted so headroom stays honest.

stageFactorVsRegexBaselineMax.comment: finding 13(a) — observed at set-time: extract 3.19 (cold, incl. WASM init), cluster 0.25, overlap 0.24, optimize 0.25, report 0.40

advisorFactorVsRegexBaselineMax.comment: finding 13(c) — observed at set-time: risk 0.18, deadcode 0.15, hotspots 0.17, campaign 0.89. The quadratic risk loop this round fixed would have measured ~20x. Round 2 #22: readingOrder observed 0.16-0.23 post-fix across runs (pre-fix would have measured ~9x on the self-map and ~78x on the loaded corpus) — budget 0.7 ~3x the max observed. Round 2 #23: breakCycles self-map observed 0.11-0.15 — budget 0.45 ~3x; cyclicBreakCyclesFactorVsRegexBaselineMax observed 0.24-0.31 post-fix on the dense-SCC corpus (pre-fix measured 1.04-1.35 — the gate catches the whole-graph re-verify class) — budget 0.9 ~3x.
